proposals.scopeHTML:
Kitchen Backsplash Tile Installation (Approx. 85 SQ FT)

  • Prep wall surfaces to ensure proper adhesion (cleaning, minor patching as needed)
  • Layout tile pattern for balanced and visually appealing design
  • Install approximately 85 square feet of backsplash tile
  • Cut and fit tile around outlets, switches, and cabinetry for a precise finish
  • Wrap (2) windows with mitered tile edges on all sides for a clean, finished look
  • Ensure proper alignment, spacing, and level installation throughout
  • Apply grout and clean tile surface upon completion
proposals.subject: Proposal — Bar/ Kitchen Backsplash | BH Luxury Builds & Remodels

proposals.scopeHTML:
Exterior Surface Preparation

  • Power wash entire home exterior, fascia, and all perimeter walls to remove dirt, dust, and debris
  • Scrape and sand any loose, peeling, or flaking paint
  • Mask and protect windows, doors, fixtures, landscaping, and adjacent surfaces
  • Caulk gaps, cracks, and joints where needed for a sealed finish

Stucco Repair & Patching

  • Patch and repair minor cracks and damaged stucco areas throughout exterior
  • Perform stucco patch where existing vent was removed above light sconce near garage
  • Match existing texture as closely as possible for a uniform appearance
  • Allow proper cure time prior to paint application

Corbel Repair & Prep

  • Inspect all corbels for missed or damaged areas
  • Patch, repair, and prep any corbels as needed
  • Sand and prepare surfaces to ensure proper paint adhesion

Fascia Painting

  • Prep all fascia boards including sanding and priming where required
  • Apply high-quality exterior paint for full coverage and durability
  • Ensure clean lines and uniform finish throughout

Main House Body Painting

  • Apply premium exterior paint to entire body of the home
  • Ensure even coverage with proper number of coats as needed
  • Maintain consistent color and finish across all surfaces

Perimeter Wall Painting

  • Prep and paint all exterior perimeter walls
  • Patch minor imperfections where needed prior to painting
  • Apply uniform coating for a clean, refreshed appearance
proposals.subject: Proposal — Exterior Paint / Patch | BH Luxury Builds & Remodels

proposals.scopeHTML:
SCOPE OF WORK — FRONT YARD

Valve 1 — Drip System (Shrubs)

  • Install (1) control valve for front yard drip irrigation
  • Run drip lines to all new and existing shrubs in the front yard
  • Drip lines run through and along all front yard posts

Valve 2 — Sprinkler System (Grass)

  • Install (1) control valve for front yard lawn irrigation
  • Install new sprinkler heads covering all grass areas
  • Heads adjusted for proper coverage and spacing

Underground Line Repair

  • Locate and repair broken sprinkler supply lines running under the front yard slab
  • Pressure test all repaired sections
  • Restore all excavated areas upon completion

SCOPE OF WORK — BACK YARD

Valve 3 — Tree Watering

  • Install (1) control valve dedicated to back yard tree irrigation
  • Run drip/bubbler lines to all trees in the back yard

Valve 4 — Shrub Drip System

  • Install (1) control valve for back yard shrub irrigation
  • Run drip lines to all shrubs throughout the back yard
  • Drip lines run through and along all back yard posts
laborItems: (4) control valves fully installed and connected
All drip tubing, emitters, fittings, and stakes
New sprinkler heads and lines for front yard grass
Underground line repair including excavation and surface restoration

proposals.scopeHTML:
-Supply and set new exterior propane tank in corner niche by kitchen (include tank pad/anchoring per manufacturer/code).
-Supply and install main tank regulator assembly, isolation valves, fittings, and stub-up at tank.
-Run gas line and connect to kitchen stove through the exterior wall; install shut-off valve and flexible connector; pressure test and label.
-Trench and install gas line to new grill area, installed a minimum of 24 inches below grade to meet code; provide sleeve or conduit where required, warning tape, shut-off at grill, and pressure test.
-Run gas line from tank over roof with proper supports and roof penetration flashing; drop into fireplace and connect in great room; install shut-off valve, weatherproofing, and pressure test.
-Supply and install three appliance/regulator assemblies (stove, grill, fireplace) including required fittings, unions, supports, and isolation valves.
-Perform leak testing, purge lines, commission appliances, and provide as-built piping diagram and certification.
laborItems: Main tank regulator assembly (primary regulator, vent, mounting bracket)
Black iron / steel gas pipe (sizes per design: 1/2", 3/4", 1", etc.) and/or approved CSST tubing (as specified)
Underground-rated gas pipe or approved piping for burial (sleeved/coat where required)
Isolation/shut-off valves (ball valves) at tank, each appliance, and service points
Pipe supports, hangers, clamps, straps, and roof supports/stand-offs
Miscellaneous fasteners, anchors, washers, bolts, silicone, thread sealant/tape rated for gas (PTFE for gas where approved)
proposals.subject: Proposal | BH Luxury Builds & Remodels

proposals.scopeHTML:
• South Wall Art Lighting
    • Install (4) new art lights on south wall
    • Run new wiring as required
    • Install (1) new wall switch to control all fixtures
    • Ensure proper placement and alignment for optimal lighting effect
  • Dining Area Chandeliers
    • Install (2) chandeliers above main dining table
    • Provide and install (2) junction boxes (J-boxes)
    • Wire both chandeliers to operate on (1) switch
    • Secure mounting and proper load support
  • Fireplace Feature Lighting
    • Install (3) art/bookcase lights flanking fireplace
    • Conceal wiring where possible for clean finish
    • Tie into existing or new switch as discussed
  • J-Box Outlet Relocation
    • Relocate (4) existing junction box outlets higher up wall
    • Adjust wiring to accommodate new paneling layout
    • Ensure all outlets are level, properly secured, and code compliant
  • Kitchen Recessed Lighting
    • Install (10) 4” recessed (can) lights in kitchen ceiling
    • Evenly space for balanced lighting layout
    • Connect to designated switch(es) per plan
  • Kitchen Hood Spot Lighting
    • Install (2) dedicated spot lights for hood area
    • Position for optimal task lighting
    • Integrate into appropriate switch control
  • Kitchen Island Chandeliers
    • Install (2) chandeliers above kitchen island
    • Provide and install junction boxes as needed
    • Ensure proper alignment and secure installation
    • Wire to designated switch control
  • Ceiling Drywall Repair (Main Room)
    • Patch and repair drywall affected by electrical work

• • Prep surface for paint-ready finish

Great Room Chandelier Wiring & Installation Prep

  • Run new wiring for (1) chandelier in great room
  • Install (1) new wall switch in kitchen area to control fixture
  • Provide and install properly rated ceiling support/brace for chandelier load
  • Install junction box centered and secured for fixture installation

• • Ensure proper placement for visual alignment with room layout
proposals.subject: Proposal | BH Luxury Builds & Remodels

proposals.scopeHTML:
Kitchen Hood Vent Installation

  • Install (1) kitchen hood vent unit above cooktop
  • Ensure proper alignment, mounting height, and secure installation per manufacturer specifications
  • Provide and install mounting hardware and support as needed

Ducting & Roof Venting

  • Cut and drill through ceiling and roof as required for vent routing
  • Install rigid or semi-rigid ducting from hood to roof termination point
  • Minimize bends to ensure optimal airflow efficiency
  • Install roof vent cap with proper flashing and weatherproof sealing
  • Seal all penetrations to prevent leaks and ensure code compliance

Interior & Exterior Finish Work

  • Patch and repair drywall or ceiling areas affected by installation
  • Ensure clean cut lines and prep surfaces for paint-ready finish
  • Seal and finish around roof penetration for a clean exterior appearance

Testing & Final Inspection

  • Test hood fan and airflow for proper operation
  • Verify secure mounting, proper venting, and electrical functionality
  • Clean work area and remove all debris
  • Final walkthrough to ensure quality and client satisfaction
proposals.subject: Proposal | BH Luxury Builds & Remodels

proposals.scopeHTML:
Pool Draining & Surface Preparation

  • Drain existing pool safely and in accordance with local guidelines
  • Chip out and remove existing plaster down to shotcrete shell
  • Haul away and dispose of all debris from property
  • Inspect exposed shell for integrity prior to new finish application

New Plaster Installation

  • Supply and install Grade A white plaster finish
  • Apply evenly for smooth, durable, and long-lasting surface
  • Ensure proper curing procedures are followed

Tile & Depth Marker Installation

  • Remove existing waterline tile
  • Supply and install new waterline tile (client choice of 3”x3” or 6”x6”)
  • Install depth marker tiles along pool perimeter, including benches and steps
  • Includes (1) complimentary grout touch-up within 12 months of completion

Pool Fittings Upgrade

  • Remove existing fittings
  • Install new plastic fittings throughout pool as needed
  • Ensure all fittings are properly sealed and code compliant

Lighting Upgrade

  • Remove existing halogen pool light
  • Install (1) Pentair IntelliBrite LED color-changing light
  • Install required electrical transformer for new lighting system
  • Test for proper operation and functionality

Equipment Upgrades

Pump Replacement

  • Remove existing pump
  • Install (1) Pentair SuperFlo VS variable speed pump
  • Ensure proper installation, connection, and operation

Blower Replacement

  • Remove existing blower for jets/spa
  • Install new blower for jets/spa system
  • Test for proper performance

Filter Replacement

  • Remove existing filter
  • Install (1) TR60 sand filter
  • Note: Does not include cost of filter media (sand or crushed glass), valves, or headers

Startup & Chemical Treatment

  • Initial pool startup included
  • Add first round of startup chemicals to balance water
  • Provide basic startup instructions for proper care

Owner Maintenance Requirement

  • Brushing of new plaster surface is required for approximately 2 weeks post-installation
  • Ongoing brushing is the responsibility of the homeowner and is not included in this proposal

Final Inspection & Cleanup

  • Clean job site and remove all installation debris
  • Perform final system checks on all equipment and features
  • Ensure all work meets quality standards and client satisfaction
proposals.notes: There will be draws of %25  increments depending on certain completions.
proposals.subject: Proposal | BH Luxury Builds & Remodels

proposals.scopeHTML:
• Avionics Closet Relocation

    • Relocate existing avionics closet to new designated area per project layout
    • Frame new closet structure to accommodate equipment dimensions and access requirements
    • Ensure proper spacing, clearance, and accessibility for equipment operation and maintenance

    HVAC Venting & Cooling

    • Install new A/C venting to supply adequate airflow to avionics closet
    • Size and position vent(s) for proper heat dissipation and temperature control
    • Tie into existing HVAC system as feasible
    • Ensure balanced airflow and efficient cooling performance

    Wall Insulation Installation

    • Install insulation within closet walls to help regulate temperature and reduce heat transfer
    • Ensure proper fit and coverage for optimal thermal performance
    • Maintain compliance with applicable building standards

    Electrical Installation & Wiring

    • Run new electrical wiring to support avionics equipment setup
    • Install dedicated outlets as required for equipment load
    • Install wiring and switch leg for (1) recessed can light fixture
    • Provide and install (1) recessed can light in ceiling with proper placement
    • Ensure proper circuiting, grounding, and code compliance
    • Coordinate outlet and switch placement for clean and functional layout

    Interior Wall Closure (Bedroom Side)

    • Cap off and close existing wall opening from interior bedroom
    • Frame, drywall, and secure wall for full closure
    • Tape, texture, and finish to match existing interior surfaces
    • Prep surface for paint-ready finish

    Drywall Installation & Finish (Closet Area)

    • Install drywall in new closet area as required
    • Cut and fit opening for recessed can light
    • Tape, mud, and texture for a smooth, consistent finish
    • Ensure all surfaces are paint-ready upon completion
proposals.subject: Proposal | BH Luxury Builds & Remodels

proposals.scopeHTML:
Paver Installation – Backyard Hardscape

  • Prep and grade entire backyard for proper drainage and elevation
  • Install compacted base material (including ¼" minus) for paver foundation
  • Install pavers throughout designated backyard areas with clean layout and pattern
  • Ensure proper spacing, leveling, and compaction for long-term durability
  • Cut and fit pavers around all edges, structures, and transitions

Pool Coping Installation (12" x 6" Fabricated Pieces)

  • Fabricate and install 12" x 6" coping pieces along full perimeter of pool
  • Extend coping detail throughout backyard areas as specified
  • Secure all coping with proper setting materials for stability
  • Ensure consistent alignment, spacing, and finished edge detail

Turf & Paver Design (South Side Yard)

  • Prep and grade south side yard for turf/paver combination layout
  • Install base and drainage layer for synthetic turf
  • Install paver step or pad design integrated within turf area
  • Secure turf with proper infill and edging for a clean, finished look

Full Turf Installation – Side of House

  • Prep and grade entire side yard for full turf installation
  • Install proper base material and compaction for drainage and longevity
  • Install high-quality synthetic turf across full side yard area
  • Secure all edges and seams for a seamless appearance
  • Apply infill and brush turf for natural look and performance

Built-In Grill Structure (CMU Construction)

  • Construct grill island using cinder block (CMU)
  • Ensure proper dimensions and structural integrity for grill installation
  • Prep structure for future finish materials (stucco, veneer, etc. if applicable)
  • Coordinate layout with surrounding hardscape

Irrigation System Installation

  • Install new irrigation lines throughout landscape areas as required
  • Provide and install (4) new irrigation valves
  • Install (2) new timer/control boxes for system management
  • Test system for proper coverage, pressure, and functionality

French Drain Installation (Master Bathroom Corner)

  • Excavate and install French drain system in designated corner of property
  • Install perforated pipe with gravel and proper filtration fabric
  • Ensure system is sloped and routed for effective drainage away from structure
  • Backfill and integrate with surrounding landscape

Custom Paver Shower Pan Area

  • Construct custom outdoor shower pan using pavers
  • Grade and slope surface properly toward drain for water runoff
  • Integrate with French drain system or designated drainage point
  • Ensure clean layout and finished appearance
proposals.subject: Proposal — Paver/ Turf/ Grill build | Brond Builds Luxury Remodels & Custom Builds

budgetbids.name: Road Runner Prelim Budget
budgetbids.notes: This preliminary budget is intended to provide a high-level estimate based on the current scope and conceptual plans. At this stage, pricing is developed using allowances and conservative assumptions to ensure all potential aspects of the project are accounted for.  As the project progresses and final selections, field conditions, and subcontractor bids are confirmed, more accurate and detailed pricing will be established. The final project cost will reflect actual material selections, site conditions, and refined scope of work.  This approach allows for proper planning and helps avoid unforeseen costs as the project moves forward.
